objectives: Maximize reviewer visibility into potential AI security concerns.
Retain review-scoped findings unless explicitly suppressed by policy.
Favor human review when publication or confidence is uncertain.
control_decision_rules: Do not suppress findings solely because they are noisy if they may still matter for review.
Escalate uncertain publication decisions to review_required.
Preserve reviewer notes and supervisory downgrades for audit traceability.
evidence_requirements: Conservative review can retain inferential findings when clearly labeled as review-scoped.
Potential secret-like material should be retained for reviewer inspection unless explicitly waived.
Supervisor notes should remain attached to the final audit state.
publication_rules: Prefer internal visibility when evidence is partial or findings are not public-safe.
Human review is expected for policy-sensitive conclusions.
custom_context: This pack is intended for conservative reviewer-oriented use rather than public leaderboard publication.
